absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: scan text files with bounded traversal
detect secret-shaped tokens without storing the token values
emit severity-tagged security and configuration findings
public_purpose: Scans repository files for common secret, config, and safety findings.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: keywords: security, scanning, secrets, SAST, dependencies, vulnerabilities, model-agnostic
